# RSI-Only Sweep (ETH added, DOGE removed)

Fixed non-RSI params while sweeping only entry RSI:
- Symbols: `BTCUSDT,LINKUSDT,SOLUSDT,XRPUSDT,ETHUSDT`
- Window: `2022-01-01` onward (same DB end as prior run)
- Fixed exits: MFE/lock `(0.8->0.6), (6.0->5.0)`, TP `8R`, SL_N `2`, fee `3 bps`
- RSI combos tested: `(30|35|40)` x `(60|65|70)` with `L < H`
